name: Garlicky Pasta Chicken Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 Tbsp Fresh rosemary leaves or 1 tsp dried rosemary leaves
8 oz Corkscrew pasta, cooked and drained
2 cups Cooked chicken, cut into strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Separate cloves of garlic and drop into boiling water for 1 minute. Drain and peel.
2. Place peeled cloves in a small saucepan with oil and optional rosemary sprigs. Cook gently, covered, stirring occasionally, for about 25 minutes or until garlic is tender. Discard rosemary sprigs.
3. Puree the garlic with 1/2 cup of the olive oil, basil, and rosemary leaves.
4. Place pasta in a large bowl and add garlic puree, chicken, onion, Parmesan cheese, salt, and pepper. Mix thoroughly.
5. Add more olive oil if needed to moisten salad.
6. Let salad sit at room temperature (provided it's not a hot room that will invite bacteria) or refrigerate, returning mixture to room temperature before serving.
7. Toast walnuts in a 375-degree oven for 10 minutes. Stir into the salad and serve over a mix of crisp, chilled lettuce leaves.
